title: Robotics Foundations
subtitle: Understanding the Building Blocks of Every Robot
description: Master the fundamental concepts that power every robot. From mechanical components to control systems, learn what makes robots move, think, and interact with the world.

modules.title: Introduction to Robotics
modules.description: Explore what defines a robot and how they're used in the real world

modules.title: Types of Sensors
modules.description: Introduction to robot sensors and their applications

title: Block Coding
subtitle: Visual Programming for Robotics
description: Learn to program robots using visual block-based languages. Master sequences, loops, conditionals, and events with hands-on SPIKE or Scratch projects.

modules.title: Simple Sequences
modules.description: Building programs that do one thing after another

modules.title: Practical Loop Applications
modules.description: Using loops to solve real problems

modules.title: Sensor-Based Decisions
modules.description: Using sensors to control program flow

levels.title: Events and Triggers
levels.subtitle: Responding to changes in the environment

title: Python & MicroPython
subtitle: Real Programming for Real Robots
description: Graduate to real programming with Python. Learn variables, functions, and data structures while controlling actual hardware with MicroPython on robot platforms.

modules.title: Getting Started with Python
modules.description: Setting up Python and writing your first programs

modules.title: MicroPython Basics
modules.description: Introduction to MicroPython on robot platforms

title: Pybricks for FLL
subtitle: First LEGO League Programming Excellence
description: Master Pybricks programming specifically for FLL competitions. Learn precise motor control, sensor-based navigation, and autonomous mission programming.

levels.title: Pybricks Essentials
levels.subtitle: Getting started with the FLL programming framework

modules.title: Pybricks Fundamentals
modules.description: Introduction to the Pybricks library and EV3

modules.title: Motor Control
modules.description: Precise control of motors for FLL

modules.title: Sensor Integration
modules.description: Reading and using sensor data in Pybricks

title: FTC Java
subtitle: FIRST Tech Challenge Advanced Programming
description: Enter the world of advanced robotics with FTC. Learn Java, FTC Blocks, OnBot Java, and Android Studio to build sophisticated teleop and autonomous programs.

levels.title: FTC Fundamentals
levels.subtitle: Introduction to FTC and the SDK

modules.title: FTC Overview
modules.description: Understanding FIRST Tech Challenge and the hardware ecosystem

title: CAD & 3D Design
subtitle: Digital Design for Robots
description: Master digital design tools like Tinkercad, BrickLink Studio, and Onshape. Design robot parts, visualize assemblies, and prepare designs for 3D printing.

modules.title: Tinkercad Essentials
modules.description: Getting started with Tinkercad for simple designs

title: Robotics Engineering
subtitle: Mechanical Design and Optimization
description: Learn the engineering principles behind robot design. Study drivetrains, gearing systems, mechanical advantage, and the design process for optimal performance.

modules.title: Drivetrain Types
modules.description: Different ways to move a robot

title: Simulation Lab
subtitle: Virtual Robotics and Testing
description: Test and debug programs without physical robots. Use virtual SPIKE hub simulation, simulated movement, and challenge maps to practice before competition.

modules.title: Introduction to Simulation
modules.description: Benefits and tools for virtual testing

title: 3D Printing & Fabrication
subtitle: From Design to Physical Parts
description: Master the process of preparing designs for 3D printing. Learn about materials, slicer settings, tolerances, print preparation, and post-processing.

modules.title: Design for 3D Printing
modules.description: Modifying CAD models for successful prints

levels.title: Advanced Slicing and Settings
levels.subtitle: Optimizing prints for quality and speed

title: Portfolio & Engineering Notebook
subtitle: Documentation and Reflection Across All Levels
description: Document your learning journey and projects. Master engineering notebook practices, portfolio building, and reflective practices that prepare you for competitions and college.
